subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-02-16 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Had it not been for the deniers of the Blessed Beauty, these glad-tidings would not have been fulfilled; yet the greatness of the Cause lieth in this, that the adversaries became themselves the cause of its exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر نفی جمال مبارک نبود این بشارات تحقق نمی یافت ولی عظمت امر در این است که اعدا مسبب این ارتقاع شدند
subcodes.subjects: @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
